subject.title: docs: add provider options documentation page
subject.body:
## Summary

Add comprehensive documentation for provider options, covering configuration, setup, and best practices for providers in the system.

## Changes

**Documentation (`content/docs/02-foundations/06-provider-options.mdx`)**

- Create new provider options documentation page with detailed explanations
- Include provider configuration examples and use cases
- Document available options and their purposes
- Add best practices and implementation guidelines

**Documentation Index (`content/docs/02-foundations/index.mdx`)**

- Register new provider options documentation page in the foundations section navigation
subject.extra:
pr summary:
- adds a new documentation page covering provider options and provider setup guidance
- updates docs navigation to surface the new provider options reference
- docs-only change, but the subject matter is provider configuration rather than core runtime behavior

changed files:
- content/docs/02-foundations/06-provider-options.mdx (+337 -0)
- content/docs/02-foundations/index.mdx (+6 -0)
